sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْعَالِمُ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى النُّجُومِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Naučnik je svake noći gledao u zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: The scholar used to look at the stars every night.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَكْتُبُ مَا يَرَاهُ فِي كُرَّاسٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Bilježio je ono što vidi u veliku bilježnicu.
sentences.translationEn: He would write what he saw in a large notebook.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَى كُلَّ نَجْمٍ اسْمًا خَاصًّا بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dao je svakoj zvijezdi posebno ime.
sentences.translationEn: He gave each star its own special name.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرٌ مِنْ هَذِهِ الأَسْمَاءِ لَا تَزَالُ تُسْتَخْدَمُ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Mnoga od ovih imena koriste se još danas.
sentences.translationEn: Many of these names are still used today.
